description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow should have four jobs: msvc, mingw, linux, and macos, each running on a different environment (windows-latest, windows-latest, ubuntu-latest, and macOS-latest respectively). For each job, check out the repository with submodules, install required tools (msvc-dev-cmd, chocolatey packages, or brew packages), compile using ninja, and upload the resulting binaries as an artifact named bee.
